message_text: I want to give an update about my remaining loan payment. I will not be able to pay this month.
I’m an AI agent acting on behalf of Nira, and this conversation is being logged. I’m contacting you about your Nira loan ending ****4831. Please confirm the last four digits of the account reference.
I already told you I can’t pay, and I’m not going back and forth on account details right now.
Understood. I’ll stop the assessment here and note that you said you cannot pay this month and do not want to go back and forth on account details in this channel.

I’m unemployed right now, so there’s nothing more to discuss.

Understood. I’ve noted that you’re unemployed and unable to discuss this further. I will respect your request and flag the account to stop contact. If a lender-approved hardship review is available, it can be handled without further discussion from you at this time.
